label: Transparent Citrine motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Citrine transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated citrine crystal cluster motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A citrine crystal pocket specimen with transparent honey-yellow quartz points, clear white terminations, pale grey matrix fragments at the base, crisp facets, subtle internal refraction, mineral inclusions, and a bright finance-system polish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show a compact crystal pocket cluster with several vertical hexagonal points and smaller supporting crystals, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves honey yellow clarity, clear white highlights, and cool grey stone shadows; premium, precise, optimistic.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry, no coin, no people, no cave scene, no landscape, no labels, no watermark, no text, no duplicate object, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt: Create one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Citrine" / "Citrine Crystal" as a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible source reference for a bright finance system. Use the citrine crystal pocket motif: transparent honey-yellow crystal facets, clear white highlights, cool grey matrix stone, and precise refractive geometry. Use Honey Yield #f4b43f, Clear Quartz #fff8e6, Ledger Ink #24221c, Crystal Grey #9aa0a2, Pale Vein #e8dcc0, Warm Bullion #d98a1c, Mint Positive #3f8f72, Risk Garnet #b84b45, and Deep Graphite #343434 consistently. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, semantic tokens, radius, spacing, shadow, buttons, forms, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, navigation, finance KPI cards, charts, portfolio allocation, transaction table, empty/error/loading states, texture, and icons. Use crystal-facet grid lines, chamfered panels, clear white surfaces, honey-yellow primary actions, grey borders, precise numeric hierarchy, green positive indicators, and garnet negative indicators. Exclude generic purple or blue gradients, unrelated neon colors, jewelry branding, coins as motif, people, random logos, and misspellings.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt: Create one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Citrine" / "Citrine Crystal" as a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible source reference for a bright finance system translated to dark mode. Use the same citrine crystal pocket motif: transparent honey-yellow facets, clear white glints, cool grey matrix stone, and precise refractive geometry. Use Deep Graphite #1f1f1c, Ledger Ink #24221c, Graphite Panel #2f302d, Clear Quartz #fff8e6, Honey Yield #f4b43f, Warm Bullion #d98a1c, Crystal Grey #9aa0a2, Pale Vein #e8dcc0, Mint Positive #52b58f, and Risk Garnet #d66860 consistently. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, semantic tokens, radius, spacing, shadow, buttons, forms, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, navigation, finance KPI cards, charts, portfolio allocation, transaction table, empty/error/loading states, texture, and icons. Preserve the light board's crystal-facet grid language with graphite panels, luminous citrine actions, quartz text, honey focus rings, precise numeric hierarchy, green positive indicators, and garnet negative indicators. Exclude generic purple or blue gradients, unrelated neon colors, jewelry branding, coins as motif, people, random logos, cyberpunk styling, and misspellings.
